syntax_13062.creator: Nagasonic
syntax_13062.title: Translate
syntax_13062.description: Translates a given text into a different language.

en: Translates a given text into a different language.

syntax_13065.creator: Nagasonic
syntax_13065.title: Romanize/Transliterate
syntax_13065.description: Transliterates the given Cyrillic text into english.

en: Transliterates the given Cyrillic text into english.

syntax_14973.creator: Nagasonic
syntax_14973.title: Translated Text
syntax_14973.description: Returns the translated text of a string as a language.

en: Returns the translated text of a string as a language.

syntax_13063.creator: Nagasonic
syntax_13063.title: Translate Specific
syntax_13063.description:
Different from the Translate effect in that it specifies the current language of the string
This can help to reduce misunderstandings caused by the auto-detect language.
syntax_13063.syntax_pattern:
translate %strings% to %language% from %language%
translate %strings% from %language% to %language%

en:
Different from the Translate effect in that it specifies the current language of the string
This can help to reduce misunderstandings caused by the auto-detect language.

syntax_13765.creator: Nagasonic
syntax_13765.title: Language From Code
syntax_13765.description: Returns the language from a language code. Language codes can be viewed here: https://cloud.google.com/translate/docs/languages

en: Returns the language from a language code. Language codes can be viewed here: https://cloud.google.com/translate/docs/languages
